data.title: Mossad agent killed abroad significantly influenced Iran war, Barnea reveals | The Jerusalem Post
data.description: Barnea did not specify who M. was, when they fell, or which incident it was. He did not say where M. fell, only noting that it was outside of Israel's borders.
data.keywords: Mossad,Israel Iran War,Mossad Agent,David Barnea,Operation Roaring Lion
